description: Utility Devices from Five Parsecs From Home Core Rules (pp.56-57). Any character can carry up to 3 items from this list.

utility_devices.name: Auto Sensor
utility_devices.description: If an enemy begins or ends a move within 4" and Line of Sight of the character, you may immediately fire one shot from any Pistol carried. The shot is resolved even if the enemy is in contact with a character and Hits only on a natural 6.

utility_devices.name: Battle Visor
utility_devices.description: When shooting, the character may reroll any 1s on the firing dice.

utility_devices.name: Communicator
utility_devices.description: When making the Reaction roll each round, you may roll one additional die, then choose a die to discard.

utility_devices.name: Concealed Blade
utility_devices.description: If the character begins their round within 2" of an opponent, they may throw the blade as a Free Action before doing anything else. Roll to Hit normally, resolving the Hit with Damage +0. The blade can be used once per battle, and is replaced afterwards for free.

utility_devices.name: Displacer
utility_devices.description: Usable once per mission instead of Moving. Aim anywhere in sight. The character teleports to a point 1D6" away in a random direction. If the teleport would end up within a solid obstacle, the device fails and must be Repaired before it can be used again. The character emerges on the same height as the aiming point, which may cause them to fall if they emerge in open air. The character may take a Combat Action after teleporting. If used by a Precursor character, you may establish two landing points, and select to use either.

utility_devices.name: Distraction Bot
utility_devices.description: Usable once per battle as a Combat Action. Select an enemy within 12". Next time they would become active, they are unable to act, though they remove Stun markers as normal. Use a small marker to remember.

utility_devices.name: Grapple Launcher
utility_devices.description: As a Combat Action, the character may use the launcher to scale a terrain feature within 1". The character can ascend up to 12" but must reach a surface they can stand on.

utility_devices.name: Grav Dampener
utility_devices.description: The character suffers no damage from falling and can descend from any height with no risk. If dropping more than 6", it counts as the character's Move for the round.

utility_devices.name: Hazard Suit
utility_devices.description: If the character takes a Hit from an environmental hazard, they receive a 5+ Saving Throw.

utility_devices.name: Hover Board
utility_devices.description: The character may use the board to move instead of walking. When used, the character can move up to 9" and can ignore any terrain that is man-height or lower. While hover-boarding, the character cannot engage in combat, but can perform a non-Combat Action as needed.

utility_devices.name: Insta-Wall
utility_devices.description: May be used once per mission as a Combat Action. Place a marker within 3", then place a 2" long force wall oriented any way you like, as long as it touches the marker. The wall is man-height and impenetrable to attacks (but does not block sight or mental abilities). At the start of each subsequent round, a D6 is rolled. On a 6, the wall dissipates.

utility_devices.name: Jump Belt
utility_devices.description: Instead of Moving normally, the character may jump up to 9" directly forward and 3" upwards. The character may take a Combat Action normally after landing.

utility_devices.name: Motion Tracker
utility_devices.description: Add +1 to all rolls to Seize the Initiative.

utility_devices.name: Multi-Cutter
utility_devices.description: As a Combat Action, the character can cut a man-sized hole through any terrain feature up to 1" thick. The tool has no effect on force fields.

utility_devices.name: Robo-Rabbit's Foot
utility_devices.description: A character with Luck 0 counts as having Luck 1. If the character would die while carrying this, the foot is destroyed (and cannot be Repaired), but the character escapes harm.

utility_devices.name: Scanner Bot
utility_devices.description: The crew adds +1 to all Seize the Initiative rolls.

utility_devices.name: Snooper Bot
utility_devices.description: May be deployed before a battle, if the Seize the Initiative roll would be penalized or negated. The penalty can be ignored, but the Bot is Damaged on a D6 roll of a 1.

utility_devices.name: Sonic Emitter
utility_devices.description: Any enemy within 5" suffers -1 to all Hit rolls when shooting.

utility_devices.name: Steel Boots
utility_devices.description: If the character rolls a natural 5 or 6 in a Brawl and wins the Brawl, they may opt to kick their opponent. This hits with Damage +0 and knocks them 1D3" directly backwards. If the opponent is kicked into another character, that character is knocked 1D3" in a random direction.

utility_devices.name: Time Distorter
utility_devices.description: Activated as a Free Action. Select up to 3 enemy figures on the battlefield. They are frozen in time until the end of the following round. While in this state, they cannot Move, take any Actions, or be affected by attacks or effects in any way. They are unaffected by Morale rolls as well. Single-use.
